sections.paragraph: f. (from the root צָוָה) pl. מִצְֹות a command, a precept, 2Ki 18:36 especially used of the precepts of God, Deuteron. 6:1 , 25 7:11 of a human teacher, Pro 7:1, . The idea of prohibition is found Lev 4:13, אַחַת מִכָּל־מִצְֹות יְהֹוָה אֲשֶׁר לֹא־תֵעָשֶׂינָה “any of the commandments of Jehovah which ought not to be done,” i.e. things prohibited by his precepts. מִצְוַת הַלְּוִיִּים what was due to the Levites, Neh 13:5 comp. מִשְׁפָּט.
